title: BASICS-CDSS: Beyond-Accuracy Evaluation Methodology for Safety-Critical Clinical Decision Support
description: A beyond-accuracy evaluation methodology for safety-critical clinical decision support. Given predictions and outcomes, it computes calibration, coverage-risk, harm, and utility metrics, stratifies results by safety tier, and exports curated manuscript and supplementary figures, including reliability diagrams, coverage-risk and abstention analyses, and harm-by-tier summaries.
